prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: SON-SJSIMRS999-PS-STL-BUN-TT Product Type: RUBBER_STAMP Brand (from catalog): ToolTreaux Existing Title: ToolTreaux Signature Inscription Marking Stamp for Jewelry Making - Silver 999 Description: The ToolTreaux jewelry marking stamp is a must-have jewelry making too for marking your jewelry’s precious metal authenticity with ease. It features a bent stamp tip that is ideal for marking inside of hard-to-reach jewelry like rings, necklaces and bracelets.

This stamp creates a small mark that says “999” on your jewelry to indicate the metal type, making this an ideal option for jewelry-makers who want to authenticate to their clients what type of metal they are using. This is especially important for people who may have allergic reactions to certain metals.

Made of stainless steel, our marking stamp is corrosion-resistant to ensure a long service life. Each stamp measures just 3.75” in length and weighs just 1.41 ounces. Although originally designed to place a unique stamp on jewelry, marking stamps are also widely used by watchmakers to verify authenticity. Identifying the mark on jewelry is the first step in determining the value of the piece, so make sure you’re marking your jewelry properly. Search Terms: jewelry making kit jewelry making supplies beading and jewelry making metal stamping kit leather stamping tools watch repair kit watch repair tools diy jewelry supplies diy jewelry crafting supplies metal stamp metal stamp kit jewelry stamper Features: - BENT STYLE MARKING STAMP - ToolTreaux jewelry marking stamps feature a bent stamp tip ideal for marking inside of hard to reach jewelry like bracelets, rings, necklaces and more. Mark your jewelry’s precious metal authenticity with ease - SILVER 999 MARK - Stamp creates a small mark that says “999” on your jewelry to indicate the metal type; Ideal for jewelry makers who need to ensure clients what type of metal the jewelry is made of - DURABLE AND LIGHTWEIGHT - Made of stainless steel that won’t rust to ensure a long service life; Measures 3.75” in length and weighs just 1.41 ounces; Easy to use for both beginners and professionals - MUST-HAVE JEWELRY MAKING TOOL - Designed to place a unique stamp on jewelry, marking stamps are also widely used by other metalworking crafters like watchmakers to verify authenticity; Identifying mark is the first step in determining the value of the watch or piece of jewelry - SPECIFICATIONS: Material: corrosion-resistant stainless steel; Color: black; Marking size: Silver 999; Length: 3.75”; Weight: 1.41 ounces (.08 pounds); Verifies authenticity of jewelry and watches === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Provide a title for the item that may be customer facing === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}

anthropic.item_name: ToolTreaux Silver 999 Bent Jewelry Marking Stamp

anthropic.title_differentiation: Bent Tip For Hard-to-Reach Areas, Stainless Steel, Jewelry And Watch Authentication, 375 Inches

openai.title_differentiation: Bent Tip For Hard To Reach Rings And Bracelets, Stainless Steel, Corrosion Resistant, Silver 999 Authenticity
